title: Radiolabeled spermine uptake in cells
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"btv7s","text":"This protocol provides a technique to determine radiolabeled spermine uptake in cells, via the acquisition of counts per minute (CPM) using a Liquid Scintillation Counter. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"388nk","text":"Proper guidelines for working with radiolabeled materials should be followed at all times. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"fp3p9","text":"14C-labeled spermine: 3139-50 µCi, ARC","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":0,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ct6ka","text":"Cold spermine: 85590-5G, Merck","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"90t6d","text":"RIPA Lysis and Extraction Buffer: 89900, Invitrogen","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"34ful","text":"EcoLite Liquid Scintillation Cocktail: 01882475-CF, MP Biomedicals","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Cells are seeded in 12-well plates, such that 70-80% confluency is reached on the day of the assay. Seed out 2 'treatment' wells and 1 'background' well per cell line.
Remove the culture medium from all wells.
Remove the last wash, then add 200 µl RIPA buffer to the wells.

Scrape the cells and pipette the lysates into scintillation vials, that are filled with 7 mL of scintillation fluid (Ecolite (+), MP). Rinse each well with 200 µL PBS (-/-) and pipette into the respective scintillation vial.
Mix scintillation vials well prior acquisition of counts per minute (CPM) in the Liquid Scintillation Counter.

In the treatment wells: add 300 µL of medium, containing 5 µM radiolabeled spermine. In the background wells: add 300 µL of medium, containing 5 µM radiolabeled spermine and 100 µM unlabeled (cold) spermine.
creator: Stephanie Vrijsen
